betterquesting:10.desc:8: This is the second leg of the platline - the processing of rare metal residues. Here, the platline splits into several different chains. These will net you a significant amount of rhodium, ruthenium, osmium, iridium, and gold, along with a smaller amount of copper and nickel. This entire process is, like many others, a loop. If you care enough to balance it out, the line will function with only platinum residue dust as an input.
